lines.text: I'm with you. {PlayerName} is definitely onto something here! It'd be great if we could catch him, and there's no real downside if we don't!
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: But who would actually have this weird idea to drag this model out for something like this? Now that we've blown its cover, the only thing we can do is to ship it back to the Institute for repairs.
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
Thank you, and farewell, my other self

lines.text: But we are talking about "massive computing power" and "incredibly precise data" to make this work... I wonder who could have done this…
lines.quest_name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
